reference: Jeong, H. (1997). Effects of voids on the mechanical strength and ultrasonic attenuation of laminated composites. Journal of Composite Materials, 31(3), 276-292.
notes: Woven fabric architecture (different from UD in other papers). Void morphology effects linked to ultrasonic attenuation. Fabric layup approximated as (0)_n for model input; actual weave is 2D.
